scoring_model.floor_rule: Any dependency with at least one CRITICAL CVE is floored at band HIGH

ranked.cve_severity_notes: Max CVSS 10.0 (CVE-2021-44228). Density bonus +1.5 for 4 CVEs capped at 10.0.
ranked.business_criticality_notes: Directly imported in DiscountCalculator (internal service/batch logic). No auth/API layer detected.
ranked.band_floor_reason: Has CRITICAL CVE (CVE-2021-44228 CVSS 10.0); floored to HIGH
ranked.rationale: Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228, CVSS 10.0) enables unauthenticated RCE via JNDI injection in log messages. This jar is directly imported in production business logic. Upgrade to log4j-core 2.17.1 or later immediately; 2.24.3 is the current stable release.

ranked.cve_severity_notes: Max CVSS 10.0 (CVE-2021-44228). 1 CVE, no density bonus.
ranked.business_criticality_notes: Directly imported in DiscountCalculator alongside log4j-core; same production surface as log4j-core.
ranked.band_floor_reason: Has CRITICAL CVE (CVE-2021-44228 CVSS 10.0); floored to HIGH
ranked.rationale: log4j-api 2.14.1 is the API facade for the vulnerable log4j-core; shares Log4Shell exposure via direct import in DiscountCalculator. Must be upgraded in lockstep with log4j-core to 2.17.1+.

ranked.business_criticality_notes: No explicit import found in scanned source tree; defaulted to 2.
ranked.band_floor_reason: Has CRITICAL CVEs (CVE-2019-14379 CVSS 9.8, CVE-2019-14540 CVSS 9.8); floored to HIGH
ranked.rationale: jackson-databind 2.9.8 carries 8 known CVEs including 2 CRITICAL deserialization RCE gadget chains (CVSS 9.8). It is a compile-scope direct dependency in a data-processing service. Upgrade to 2.17.3 (latest stable) or at minimum 2.13.4.2.

ranked.cve_severity_notes: Package does not resolve; no CVE data applicable. Supply-chain risk evaluated separately.
ranked.band_override_reason: TYPOSQUATTED supply-chain artifact: groupId 'com.fastxml.jackson.core' impersonates 'com.fasterxml.jackson.core'. Classified CRITICAL regardless of CVSS score.
ranked.latest_stable_version: N/A (coordinate does not exist on Maven Central)
ranked.rationale: TYPOSQUATTED dependency: 'com.fastxml' (missing 'er') mimics the real 'com.fasterxml.jackson.core' groupId. This coordinate does not exist on Maven Central and is a textbook supply-chain attack vector. Remove from pom.xml immediately. No fix version — delete the entry.

ranked.exposure_notes: Direct(+4) + compile(+3) = 7. Not a network/serialization library (+0).
ranked.business_criticality_notes: No imports found in scanned source; defaulted to 2.
ranked.rationale: Guava 24.1.1-jre carries 3 CVEs including unbounded memory allocation (CVE-2018-10237) and insecure temp directory creation. Three-version density pushes the severity score to HIGH band. Upgrade to 33.4.0-jre.

ranked.cve_severity_notes: No CVEs identified for this version.
ranked.business_criticality_notes: MySQL connector in an invoice/commerce service strongly implies payment and PII data access. Assigned +5 (auth/PII/payment context) via contextual inference (no explicit import found; criticality_source=inferred).
ranked.rationale: No CVEs in scope but GPL-2.0 license violates a permissive-only policy in a commercial service. MySQL connector mediates all database I/O for an invoice system (PII/payment data). Upgrade to 8.0.33 and evaluate switch to 'mysql:mysql-connector-java:8.0.33' or the Oracle-licensed com.mysql:mysql-connector-j:9.3.0.

ranked.cve_severity_notes: No CVEs identified for this version.
ranked.rationale: No known CVEs but version 2.4 is approximately 12 years behind current stable (2.18.0). Outdated minor-version upgrade. Low risk but should be updated in routine maintenance.

ranked.cve_severity_notes: No CVEs identified for this version.
ranked.rationale: No known CVEs but version 3.4 is significantly behind current stable (3.17.0). Low risk; update in normal sprint cycle.
Test-scope only, no CVEs. Minor version behind (5.10.2 vs 5.13.0). Update opportunistically.

supply_chain_findings.detail: pom.xml declares a plain-HTTP repository. Maven 3.8+ blocks HTTP mirrors by default. Susceptible to MITM artifact injection if the block is overridden. Remove or replace with HTTPS.
groupId 'com.fastxml.jackson.core' is a deliberate typosquatt of 'com.fasterxml.jackson.core'. Does not exist on Maven Central. Remove from pom.xml immediately.
